name: drdocks/wp-plugin-kit
description: Gedeelde PHP runtime-bibliotheek voor Dr.Docks en Jellit WordPress plugins: updater, settings base, admin menu, helpers.

scripts.lint-unicode: bash -c '! grep -rEn "\\u[0-9a-fA-F]{4}" --include="*.php" --exclude-dir=vendor . || (echo "ERROR: JS-style \uXXXX unicode escapes found in PHP files — use literal UTF-8 characters instead." && exit 1)'
